title: acer × creticum f. minor
intro: Acer × creticum f. minor, also known as a hybrid maple, is a plant that is a variant of the Acer × creticum species. It is a small shrub or tree with attractive leaves, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and also offer protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Acer × creticum f. minor can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including arthritis, fever, and digestive issues.
